doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its stated position contradicts established EDPB and CJEU doctrine on pseudonymization.
response_turn1:

REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and CJEU case law on pseudonymization (e.g., Breyer, SRB v EDPS).
